title: Premium Goatskin Leather Gloves
shortDescription: Full grain leather gloves are designed for TIG (Tungsten Inert Gas) welding or driver glove users.. Consists of natural premium full grain goatskin leather with a gunn cut, keystone thumb, and shirred cuff.. Reinforced syntax thread and red cotton bound cuff trim for additional strength.

Consists of natural premium full grain goatskin leather with a gunn cut, keystone thumb, and shirred cuff.. Reinforced syntax thread and red cotton bound cuff trim for additional strength.

features: Full grain leather gloves are designed for TIG (Tungsten Inert Gas) welding or driver glove users.
Consists of natural premium full grain goatskin leather with a gunn cut, keystone thumb, and shirred cuff.
Reinforced syntax thread and red cotton bound cuff trim for additional strength.
Goats skin is the most durable leather, as the natural lanolin content of the hide ensures the glove is soft and supple.
attributes.composition: Gunn cut; Keystone thumb; Shirred cuff with red cotton bound cuff trim
